arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc   -L/home/ubuntu/openssl-1.1.1w/openssl_arm_install/lib -L/home/ubuntu/websocket/libwebsockets/build/install_t113/lib -L/home/ubuntu/t113/t113-linux/out/t113/evb1_auto/buildroot/buildroot/target/usr/lib -L/home/ubuntu/cjson/cJSON-1.7.10/install_t113/lib CMakeFiles/websocket_test.dir/websocket_test.c.o  -o websocket_test -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/websocket/libwebsockets/build/install_t113/lib:/home/ubuntu/t113/t113-linux/out/t113/evb1_auto/buildroot/buildroot/target/usr/lib:/home/ubuntu/cjson/cJSON-1.7.10/install_t113/lib: -Wl,--start-group /home/ubuntu/websocket/libwebsockets/build/install_t113/lib/libwebsockets.so /home/ubuntu/openssl-1.1.1w/openssl_arm_install/lib/libssl.a /home/ubuntu/openssl-1.1.1w/openssl_arm_install/lib/libcrypto.a -Wl,--end-group -lpthread -ldl /home/ubuntu/t113/t113-linux/out/t113/evb1_auto/buildroot/buildroot/target/usr/lib/libz.so /home/ubuntu/cjson/cJSON-1.7.10/install_t113/lib/libcjson.so
